description: 1 Fg i X o itnOML LjuHettae Vol VIII Fort Snelling Minnesota January 19_L94a__ ilnA2 EE EE DE IH e Eli MAJOR HARRIS ARRIVES FROM JACKSON Major Ray V Harris 3rd Infantry reported this station for temporary duty from Camp Jackson South Carolina in compliance with WD Radiogram AGO dated January 11 1940 Orders will probably be received in the near future sending him to duty with the Organized Reserve at San Antonio Tex Before leaving with the 3rd Infantry i for Camp Jackson the main duties of Major Harris was Provost Marshal and Police i Prison Officer At Camp Jackson he was Commanding Officer 3rd Bn Regimental Provost Marshal Police Officer and Camp Range Officer I TECH SGT TELINTELO CMC TO PHILLIPINES The Sub Zero weather has started some few of our first three graders to a warmer climate i Technical Sergeant Leo F Telintelo i transferred to Fort Snelling from Fort Reno Oklahoma March 23 1934 His weight has not been the only thing to make him I outstanding As for his Bowling he keeps our Star Bowler Master Sergeant Coleman on his toes Sergeant Telintelo is Presiden of our famous NonCommissioned Officers Club The BULLETIN joins your
